payload.startup_idea: FAST BookSwap: campus marketplace for used books
payload.task: Design a low-friction mobile-first user flow for cataloging ISBNs and a real-time 'match alert' notification system for students seeking specific textbooks.
payload.llm_reasoning: I decomposed the startup into three core pillars: user experience/flow for the Product team, technical architecture for secure transactions/matching for the Engineering team, and hyper-local community building for the Marketing team.

payload.startup_idea: FAST BookSwap: campus marketplace for used books
payload.task: Build a secure database architecture that supports ISBN-based API integration for auto-filling book details and a geolocation-based filtering system for campus-specific marketplaces.
payload.llm_reasoning: I decomposed the startup into three core pillars: user experience/flow for the Product team, technical architecture for secure transactions/matching for the Engineering team, and hyper-local community building for the Marketing team.

payload.startup_idea: FAST BookSwap: campus marketplace for used books
payload.task: Develop a 'Campus Ambassador' referral program and partner with student organizations to launch a 'Back-to-School' acquisition campaign focused on the cost-saving value proposition.
payload.llm_reasoning: I decomposed the startup into three core pillars: user experience/flow for the Product team, technical architecture for secure transactions/matching for the Engineering team, and hyper-local community building for the Marketing team.

data.value_proposition: FAST BookSwap connects university students to an affordable, peer-to-peer marketplace for buying and selling course textbooks locally on campus.

personas.name: Alex the Budget Student
personas.pain_point: High costs of new textbooks from the campus bookstore.

personas.name: Sarah the Graduating Senior
personas.pain_point: Difficulty selling old books for a fair price after the semester ends.

personas.name: David the Commuter
personas.pain_point: Limited time to coordinate meetups for physical book exchanges.

features.name: University Email Verification
features.description: Ensures only verified students from the same campus can access the marketplace for safety.

features.name: ISBN Scanner
features.description: Allows users to scan book barcodes to auto-populate title, author, and edition details.

features.name: In-App Secure Messaging
features.description: Allows buyers and sellers to communicate regarding book condition and meeting times without exposing personal phone numbers.

features.name: Campus Map Meetup Integration
features.description: Provides suggested safe, public, and central locations on campus for book exchanges.

features.name: Wishlist Alerts
features.description: Notifies students via push notification when a book they need is listed by another student.

user_stories: As a budget-conscious student, I want to filter listings by my specific course code so that I find the exact books required for my classes.
As a seller, I want to upload photos of my book's condition so that buyers feel confident in the quality of the item they are purchasing.
As a student looking for a deal, I want to be alerted when a book on my wishlist becomes available so that I can purchase it before someone else does.
data.reasoning: These features focus on trust, speed, and affordability, which are the primary drivers for a campus-based marketplace where safety and convenience are top priorities for students.

payload.details: Landing page generated with hero section, CTA button, features list, and email capture form using LLM.

content.email_subject: Stop overpaying for your textbooks this semester
content.tagline: The affordable, peer-to-peer marketplace for campus textbooks.
content.description: FAST BookSwap makes buying and selling course materials easier by connecting you directly with students on your own campus. With built-in ISBN scanning and secure messaging, you can find the books you need at a fraction of the bookstore price.
content.cold_email: Hey, I know how brutal textbook prices can be at the start of every semester. I’m reaching out because we built FAST BookSwap to help students skip the overpriced campus bookstore and trade directly with peers nearby. You can scan your books in seconds and chat securely with buyers and sellers right on campus. Check out the app and start saving on your reading list today.
content.twitter_post: Tired of spending hundreds on textbooks? Meet FAST BookSwap: the easiest way to buy and sell books directly with students on your campus. Scan, message, and save today! #StudentLife #TextbookHack #FASTBookSwap
content.linkedin_post: The rising cost of course materials remains a significant hurdle for university students. That is why we launched FAST BookSwap, a secure, peer-to-peer marketplace designed to keep textbook money in students' pockets. By utilizing university email verification and ISBN scanning, we are making the resale process safer and faster for the entire campus community.
content.instagram_post: Stop getting ripped off at the bookstore! 📚 FAST BookSwap is officially here to help you buy and sell your used textbooks locally on campus. Use the ISBN scanner to list in seconds and chat securely with classmates. Link in bio to download and start saving!
content.slack_message: Hey everyone! If you’re looking to save some serious cash on textbooks this semester, check out FAST BookSwap. It’s a local peer-to-peer marketplace designed specifically for our campus. You can scan your books to list them instantly and chat with buyers or sellers securely. Definitely worth checking out before your next class!
